auditmanager.assessment.role.CfnAbout: The `Role` property type specifies the wrapper that contains AWS Audit Manager role information, such as the role type and IAM Amazon Resource Name (ARN).

auditmanager.assessment.role.RoleArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role.

auditmanager.assessment.role.RoleType.Description: The type of customer persona.   In `CreateAssessment`, `roleType` can only be `PROCESS_OWNER`.   In `UpdateSettings`, `roleType` can only be `PROCESS_OWNER`.  In `BatchCreateDelegationByAssessment`, `roleType` can only be `RESOURCE_OWNER`.
